sources.title: The Psychotic Ice Cream Clown | New Hollywood Horror Slasher Movie | Free Movie
sources.description:
Kruel: A horror/thriller feature length movie about a psychotic killer who masquerades as an ice cream man in order to get closer to the objects of his affection.
2015.  Stars: Kierney Nelson, Dakota Morrissiey, Adam Vernier

Killer Clown: A serial killer dressed in a clown mask and a long black robe terrorizes a small town and murders people randomly and for no apparent reason. A man whose girlfriend gets killed by the clown seeks revenge and enacts his own brand of vigilante justice.
2009.  Stars: Julian Cheah, Milly Sherratt, Peter Jackson
